project_name: David Chen — commercial_hotel — East Cape, BCS
raw_message: Good morning, I have a 15,000sqm property in East Cape with a small stream running through it. Interested in building a boutique hotel — 15 rooms, restaurant, infinity pool. Budget $2.5M USD.
initial_assessment: Commercial hotel inquiry for a 15,000sqm East Cape, BCS property. Program includes 15 guest rooms (55sqm avg), restaurant, infinity pool, spa, reception, back-of-house, and staff facilities — totaling approximately 2,000sqm of programmed space. Budget of $2.5M USD is plausible for this program scope at BCS coastal rates. Notable site condition: stream runs through the northeast corner, flagging a probable hydrologic study requirement and setback analysis before site data can be confirmed complete. Client demonstrates design engagement with specific program articulation, sustainability features (solar, greywater recycling), and boutique positioning.
